summary: I’m the Founder of the AWS Vietnam User Group and the Co-founder & CEO of OSAM, an AWS Consulting Partner in Vietnam. I’m also an AWS Certified Solutions Architect and a passionate advocate for the cloud. At OSAM, I lead an enthusiastic team that has helped many businesses — from SMEs to large enterprises — migrate to the cloud with AWS. We provide a comprehensive range of services, including cloud migration, architecture consulting, solution design on AWS, and Cloud FinOps. My vision for OSAM goes beyond being a cloud service provider; I want us to play a meaningful role in shaping Vietnam’s cloud computing ecosystem. In 2016, I founded the AWS Vietnam User Group to create a space for cloud practitioners to share knowledge and hands-on experience. Since then, the group has grown to over 15,000 members and continues to expand. We host quarterly meetups, connect SMEs with AWS experts, and offer real-time, free consultancy alongside AWS Activate Credits for startups. In 2017, I launched the “Cloud Computing Lectures for Universities” program, where we translate AWS documentation and news into Vietnamese. This initiative equips students with fundamental, up-to-date cloud knowledge and supports their career development. Since then, we’ve helped hundreds of tech students each year build critical cloud skills for the future.
